name: indiehackers-posts-scraper
title: Indie Hackers Posts Scraper
description: Pull every public Indie Hackers post with title, slug, URL, description, image, and author metadata. Discover posts via sitemap then enrich each with OG tags. Filter by section (newest, starting-up, stories) and export titles, links, and excerpts to clean JSON, CSV, or Excel for content research and trend tracking.
